title: NYSE Pillar®
summary: NYSE Pillar is an integrated trading technology platform enabling member firms to connect to NYSE equities and options markets via standard protocols. The page functions as a technical documentation hub rather than providing substantive research or policy content. [NO CHANGE NEEDED - summary is accurate]
key_points: NYSE Pillar integrates trading technology across NYSE, NYSE American Equities, NYSE Arca Equities, NYSE National, NYSE Texas, NYSE American Options, and NYSE Arca Options
The platform supports Binary Gateway and FIX Gateway protocols for equities and options
Latency statistics are provided for 4Q 2025 showing P50 latencies ranging from 17µs (NYSE Texas BIN) to 75µs (NYSE American FIX)
Trade Ops Portal (TOP) is a free web-based tool for managing orders, trade details, risk controls, and post-trade clearing
Contact information for Technology Member Services and Relationship Management is provided
why_it_matters: This page is purely technical product documentation for NYSE's trading infrastructure. It has no relevance to macro catalysts, policy decisions, or market analysis. The latency statistics provide operational performance data for a major US equity exchange. [NO CHANGE NEEDED - assessment is correct]
market_structure_context: NYSE Pillar is exchange trading infrastructure that provides connectivity protocols (BIN, FIX) for NYSE equities and options markets. The platform's latency performance metrics (P01-P99.9 percentiles for 4Q 2025) are available but this is operational/reference data rather than analytical content. [NO CHANGE NEEDED - description is accurate]
important_numbers: NYSE P50 latency: 17-75µs depending on market and protocol
NYSE P99 latency: 48-133µs depending on market and protocol
